summary: V3 7-Point Improvements - All 23 tests passed. Verified: (1) TRANSIÇÃO absorption nomenclature fix with OFI EMA confirmation, (2) COMPLACÊNCIA POSITIONAL_ONLY ratio bypass, (3) Overnight Inventory unchanged, (4) Distance-based border detection in TRANSIÇÃO, (5) BULL/BEAR pullback/bounce tolerance uses 0.25×ATR(M5), (6) N3 Time-Decay Accumulator 30s TTL, (7) Welford Exponential with alpha=0.04 decay.
passed_tests: ✅ #7 Welford cold start (n<=10) uses standard Welford algorithm
✅ #7 Welford exponential decay (n>10) applies alpha=0.04
✅ #7 Welford Z-Score uses different variance calculation for n<=10 vs n>10
✅ #7 Welford default alpha=0.04 confirmed
✅ #6 N3 TTL stitching: volumes accumulated when re-entering within 30s
✅ #6 N3 TTL reset: volumes reset when re-entering after >30s
✅ #5 BULL pullback_tolerance = 0.25 * atr_m5 (not 0.5*atr_m1)
✅ #5 BEAR bounce_tolerance = 0.25 * atr_m5 (not 0.5*atr_m1)
✅ #5 generate_execution_signal accepts atr_m5 parameter
✅ #5 evaluate() passes atr_m5 to generate_execution_signal
✅ #4 evaluate_filters uses distance-based border detection (|price-VAH| vs |price-VAL|)
✅ #4 n2_signal builder uses distance-based border detection for TRANSIÇÃO
✅ #4 Asymmetric profile scenario correctly identifies border
✅ #2 COMPLACÊNCIA POSITIONAL_ONLY sets n2_bullish_flow=True (skips ratio validation)
✅ #2 POSITIONAL_ONLY bypass is documented in code
✅ #1 SELL_ABSORPTION + above_poc → SELL (not BUY_ABSORPTION)
✅ #1 BUY_ABSORPTION + below_poc → BUY (not SELL_ABSORPTION)
✅ #1 SELL_ABSORPTION requires OFI EMA > 0.2 for SELL
✅ #1 BUY_ABSORPTION requires OFI EMA < -0.2 for BUY
✅ #1 Without OFI confirmation, action stays WAIT
✅ #1 Absorption nomenclature is documented in code
✅ Backend health endpoint returns healthy
✅ V3 signal endpoint returns valid response with N1/N2/N3 fields
critical_code_review_comments: #1 TRANSIÇÃO absorption nomenclature: BUY_ABSORPTION = passive buyers absorbing sellers → support holds → LONG. SELL_ABSORPTION = passive sellers absorbing buyers → resistance holds → SHORT. V3 trades in FAVOR of who absorbed.
#1 OFI EMA confirmation: SELL_ABSORPTION needs ofi_fast > 0.2 (buyer aggression being absorbed), BUY_ABSORPTION needs ofi_fast < -0.2 (seller aggression being absorbed)
#2 COMPLACÊNCIA POSITIONAL_ONLY: When DZ is unavailable, trusts static position (above VAH + above +2σ) instead of requiring ratio validation
#4 Border detection: Uses abs(price-VAH) < abs(price-VAL) instead of price > poc. Fixes asymmetric profiles where POC is near a border.
#5 Pullback/bounce tolerance: Uses 0.25×ATR(M5) for structural volatility, not M1 shock noise
#6 N3 TTL: 30s time-decay accumulator stitches Iceberg/Reload waves into single absorption tape
#7 Welford Exponential: First 10 observations use standard Welford (cold start), then applies alpha=0.04 decay (~25 session effective window)

test_credentials.note: Used for V3 signal endpoint test

seed_data_creation: None - tests use direct imports and code inspection
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 7-Point Improvements verified. Key code locations: (1) server.py lines 3781-3819 - absorption nomenclature fix with OFI EMA confirmation, (2) server.py lines 3703-3706 - COMPLACÊNCIA POSITIONAL_ONLY bypass, (4) server.py lines 3437-3442 and 3582-3592 - distance-based border detection, (5) server.py lines 3730 and 3859 - 0.25×ATR(M5) tolerance, (6) delta_zonal_service.py lines 519-562 - N3 TTL 30s accumulator, (7) delta_zonal_service.py lines 59-135 - Welford Exponential with alpha=0.04.

feature_verification.#2_positional_only_bypass: Working - COMPLACÊNCIA skips ratio validation when DZ unavailable

feature_verification.#5_atr_m5_tolerance: Working - BULL pullback and BEAR bounce use 0.25×ATR(M5)

feature_verification.#7_welford_exponential: Working - standard Welford for n<=10, alpha=0.04 decay for n>10
